channel.title: southernadventures1
channel.description: God First✝️ Custom Treehouse Builder southadvs@gmail.com YT channel below 👇

item.title: When A Plan Goes Perfectly….This is probably a bit confusing s...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


When A Plan Goes Perfectly….This is probably a bit confusing since I’ve been running my mouth about installing GEOTHERMAL for the treehouse but thats just not in the budget. The kit I need is $8k before tax/shipping and not including installion costs. Just cant drop 12 grand on the AC system when I can get this for less than $2000. Even though the geothermal was going to save us a ton of energy consumption, I’ve found another way to significantly cut down which I will explain in a future video. Anyway thanks for watching guys! #
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction #tinyhouse

item.title: I GET INJURED IN LITERALLY EVERY VIDEO…Anyway, I realized when...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


I GET INJURED IN LITERALLY EVERY VIDEO…Anyway, I realized when I was editing this that I am installing filters to remove bad stuff from the plastic pipes, yet the filters are PLASTIC. Bruh can’t catch a break. Maybe we need to find an alternative?
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction

item.title: PLUMBERS read below….I had to cut the part of the video where ...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


PLUMBERS read below….I had to cut the part of the video where I talked about the UV filter to keep it under 90 seconds but here’s the situation: I have a UV Filter, but theres 2 problems with it. Firstly, for every 3 hours of non use, it’s gonna heat the water in the UV chamber to 140 degrees when tis not being used. So when you turn on the cold water at the bathroom sink you’re gonna get 140 degree water thats gonna burn. With it being a small space the water isn’t gonna have time to cool Secondly, it runs 24/7, which means it’s gonna use over 260KWH/Year, and thats a lot when youre on solar. It’s like a constant leach. Both those problems could be overcome by installing a flow switch, and allowing the UV filter to only run when its needed, but it takes 2-3 minutes for the bulb to heat up to a point where its effective. So essentially every time you go to get a drink from the fridge or sink it’s basically useless. Im not sure that I even need it, I’ve tested the well water on another (MUCH OLDER MUCH MORE SHALLOW) well about 200 yards from the one that is supplying the treehouse and there was no bad bacteria. This well is over 300 feet deep. Let me know thoughts please, THANKS! #
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction #plumbing #offgrid

item.description:

This Treehouse Has Faster Internet Than YOUR House. Wait until the end and see how INSANELY fast this internet is. Premium Treehouse Wifi. Maybe the best treehouse wifi out there!

item.title: Will it work? Read Below ⬇️ I think that this Is the best co...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


Will it work? Read Below ⬇️ I think that this Is the best compromise, nothing was going above the toilet anyway and now I can easily access my filters to service. Plus the water pump is a smart pump and is supposed to detect water flow and push consistent pressure to every fixture. And it has settings you can adjust the PSI so I want it accessible. Theres going to be a 3 stage filter system on this treehouse Sediment Filter - This goes before the pump and gets rid of any dirt, sand, rust, or rock dust that comes up from the well 2 Stage Filter - This is will filter out any unwanted things like microplastics or taste from the PVC plumbing underground, but it will not filter out the healthy minerals from the earth. UV Filter - This one is probably not necessary, as the well is over 300 feet deep and its unlikely theres any harmful bacteria down there, especially since I’ve already been drinking from it here and there, but might as well. After this filter the water will flow into all copper piping. With this setup, we will we have clean and healthy water, full of minerals but not toxins, and we will also have strong and consistent pressure even this high up.
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction

item.title: He may have only had one arm but he made up for it by being the ...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


He may have only had one arm but he made up for it by being the camera man. Which also allowed him to receive immunity Another day, another think knocked off the treehouse to-do list. I met with septic guys today, internet its getting installed tomorrow, and meeting with propane guys later this week. (Yeah I changed my mind have to do some propane to take load off the solar.)
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #tinyhouse #construction #fyp

item.title: One overset staple, one cut wire, can cause as short that could ...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


One overset staple, one cut wire, can cause as short that could burn down the whole house. It’s not that it’s super complicated, you just need to be very careful and meticulous when doing this. This is the best of both worlds!
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction
